white.description: Pure white — used for light mode surfaces, text on dark backgrounds, and transparent overlay base.

0.description: Fully transparent white — gradient feathered edge start point for bar backdrops.

80.description: White at 80% opacity — frosted glass and backdrop blur effects in light mode.

black.description: Pure black — OLED-optimized dark mode gradient base.

80.description: Black at 80% opacity — strong dark mode backdrop scrim for modal overlays.

0.description: Transparent near-pure-black — gradient feathered edge start for dark mode tab bar backdrop.

50.description: Lightest gray — subtle page background tint and modal surface in light mode.

100.description: Light gray — secondary surfaces, chip backgrounds, and inner modal subsections in light mode.

300.description: Mid-light gray — primary body text in dark mode for comfortable reading.

350.description: Dark-mode mid gray — composited match of the former 40% light gray on gray.900.

450.description: Dark-mode light gray — composited match of the former 80% light gray on gray.900.

500.description: Dark-surface adapted medium gray — solid equivalent of the prior 80% gray fill on gray.900, preserving the same perceived emphasis without alpha dependence.

700.description: Dark-mode dark gray — composited match of the former 20% white on gray.900.

800.description: Deep dark gray — elevated card and modal section surface in dark mode.

850.description: Deeper dark gray — secondary gradient stop for dark mode page background depth.

880.description: Dark-mode near-surface gray — composited match of the former 8% light gray on gray.900.

900.description: Near-black gray — primary dark mode surface, matches iOS system black.

950.description: Darkest near-pure-black — OLED-optimized tab bar backdrop gradient end.

50.description: Light-mode near-white navy tint — composited match of the former 8% navy on white.

200.description: Light-mode pale navy tint — composited match of the former 20% navy on white.

700.description: Light-mode muted navy — composited match of the former 40% navy on white.

800.description: Deep navy — branded hero gradient end stop for dark mode main background.

900.description: Darkest navy — primary text, icon, and fill color in light mode for maximum contrast.

50.description: Near-white blue tint — general page gradient start color in light mode.

100.description: Very light blue — main hero gradient end color in light mode.

200.description: Pale blue — XAUT card gradient accent and secondary gradient stop.

500.description: Brand blue — primary action color, links, and interactive element affordance signal.

600.description: Dark-surface adapted brand blue — solid equivalent of the prior 80% blue on gray.900, preserving the same perceived action emphasis without alpha dependence.

800.description: Dark blue shade for pressed states, dense accents, and deeper branded emphasis.

500_a8.description: Brand blue at 8% opacity for subtle emphasis, selected surfaces, and low-contrast decorative accents.

500_a20.description: Brand blue at 20% opacity for soft fills, badges, and informational background states.

500_a40.description: Brand blue at 40% opacity for medium-emphasis fills and overlay states.

500_a60.description: Brand blue at 60% opacity for stronger tinted fills and transitional emphasis states.

500.description: Canonical success green for connected, positive, and completed states.

800.description: Dark green shade for pressed success states and deeper positive emphasis.

500_a20.description: Success green at 20% opacity for soft success backgrounds and chips.

500_a40.description: Success green at 40% opacity for medium-emphasis success fills.

500_a60.description: Success green at 60% opacity for stronger success surfaces and overlays.

500.description: Canonical error red for destructive, failed, and critical feedback states.

800.description: Dark red shade for pressed destructive states and deeper alert emphasis.

500_a20.description: Error red at 20% opacity for subtle destructive backgrounds and alert surfaces.

500_a40.description: Error red at 40% opacity for medium-emphasis alert fills.

500_a60.description: Error red at 60% opacity for stronger destructive fills and overlays.

500.description: Canonical warning orange for caution, offline, and attention states.

800.description: Dark orange shade for stronger warning emphasis and pressed caution states.

500_a20.description: Warning orange at 20% opacity for subtle warning backgrounds and offline badges.

500_a40.description: Warning orange at 40% opacity for medium-emphasis warning fills.

sc.description: Simplified Chinese fallback family observed in the Figma typography definition.

regular.description: Regular weight confirmed in the Figma typography definition.

md.description: 14px text size for secondary content and grouped headings in the Figma typography definition.

lg.description: 16px text size for navigation titles, body text, and button text in the Figma typography definition.

xl.description: 20px text size for guide titles in the Figma typography definition.

tight.description: 130% line height used by the 12px auxiliary information style in the Figma typography definition.

normal.description: 140% line height used by the main text styles in the Figma typography definition.

general.description: Primary app background in light mode — pure white for maximum contrast and visual clarity.

card.description: Card surface background in light mode — white creates clean elevated content areas.

modal.description: Modal container background in light mode — slightly off-white to create perceived depth above the page.

modal_section.description: Modal section panel background in light mode — white for a flat, clean inner content area.

modal_section_inner.description: Inner modal subsection background in light mode — light gray to visually group and differentiate nested content.

backdrop.description: Backdrop blur overlay behind modals in light mode — 80% white for a frosted glass effect.

core.description: 页面核心信息内容，比主文字B的饱和度更高，也避免了整体页面过于沉闷的色值搭配。核心信息例如balance金额，明细金额，页面大抬头等

primary.description: 适用于对应于次标题的主标题等。但该标题尚未到页面核心信息的地位

secondary.description: Supporting and secondary text in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment for more stable contrast across surfaces.

action.description: Interactive action text in light mode — brand blue to signal links, CTAs, and affordance.

placeholder.description: Placeholder and empty state hint text in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

success.description: Success text color in light mode for positive inline messaging.

error.description: Error text color in light mode for destructive and validation messaging.

warning.description: Warning text color in light mode for caution and offline messaging.

icon_primary.description: Primary icon stroke color in light mode — full navy for strong, legible icon rendering.

icon_secondary.description: Secondary icon stroke in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

default.description: Default border and divider in light mode — solid navy-derived subtle border token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

icon_chip.description: Icon chip background in light mode — light gray pill for icon-and-label chip components.

secondary.description: Secondary solid fill in light mode — full navy for secondary buttons and badge backgrounds.

tertiary.description: Tertiary fill in light mode — white for ghost buttons and outlined element backgrounds.

logo.description: Logo fill color in light mode — navy ensures brand identity is clear on white surfaces.

success.description: Filled success surface in light mode for high-emphasis positive actions and badges.

success_subtle.description: Soft success fill in light mode for chips and secondary positive surfaces.

error.description: Filled error surface in light mode for destructive actions and critical badges.

error_subtle.description: Soft error fill in light mode for alert chips and low-emphasis destructive surfaces.

warning.description: Filled warning surface in light mode for caution states and offline indicators.

warning_subtle.description: Soft warning fill in light mode for caution chips and low-emphasis attention states.

bar_backdrop.description: Tab bar backdrop gradient — transparent white to solid white for feathered top edge.

success_subtle.description: Subtle success surface in light mode for chips, pills, and low-emphasis confirmations.

semantic.gradient.bar_backdrop.description: Tab bar backdrop gradient — transparent white to solid white for feathered top edge.

semantic.gradient.general.description: General page gradient — near-white blue tint to light gray for soft background depth.

semantic.gradient.main.description: Main hero gradient — near-white blue to light blue for branded hero section depth.

semantic.gradient.xaut_card.description: XAUT card gradient — 60% white glassmorphism to pale blue accent.

semantic.status.error.description: Canonical error color in light mode for destructive and failed states.

semantic.status.error_subtle.description: Subtle error surface in light mode for alerts and destructive background states.

semantic.status.success.description: Canonical success color in light mode for positive status communication.

semantic.status.success_subtle.description: Subtle success surface in light mode for chips, pills, and low-emphasis confirmations.

semantic.status.warning.description: Canonical warning color in light mode for caution and offline states.

semantic.status.warning_subtle.description: Subtle warning surface in light mode for chips, highlights, and caution backgrounds.

semantic.stroke.icon_primary.description: Primary icon stroke color in light mode — full navy for strong, legible icon rendering.

semantic.stroke.icon_secondary.description: Secondary icon stroke in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

semantic.text.action.description: Interactive action text in light mode — brand blue to signal links, CTAs, and affordance.

semantic.text.core.description: 页面核心信息内容，比主文字B的饱和度更高，也避免了整体页面过于沉闷的色值搭配。核心信息例如balance金额，明细金额，页面大抬头等

semantic.text.error.description: Error text color in light mode for destructive and validation messaging.

semantic.text.placeholder.description: Placeholder and empty state hint text in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment.

semantic.text.primary.description: 适用于对应于次标题的主标题等。但该标题尚未到页面核心信息的地位

semantic.text.secondary.description: Supporting and secondary text in light mode — solid navy-derived token replacing the prior alpha-based treatment for more stable contrast across surfaces.

semantic.text.success.description: Success text color in light mode for positive inline messaging.

semantic.text.warning.description: Warning text color in light mode for caution and offline messaging.

semantic.textStyle.amountLarge.description: Large amount and article-title style from Figma.

semantic.textStyle.bodyMedium.description: Primary body content style from Figma.

semantic.textStyle.bodySmall.description: Secondary body content style from Figma.

semantic.textStyle.caption.description: Auxiliary information, annotation, and label style from Figma.

semantic.textStyle.groupTitle.description: Grouped section title style from Figma.

semantic.textStyle.titleLarge.description: Largest title style from Figma, used for article titles and special large amount emphasis.

semantic.textStyle.titleMedium.description: Medium title style from Figma, used for navigation headings.

semantic.textStyle.xSmall.description: Bottom navigation special-case small text style from Figma.
